text: How can a SART's effective range be mixed?

options.text: A) The SART should be placed in water immediately upon activation
B) The SART should be held as high as possible
C) Switch the SART into the "high" power position
D) If possible, the SART should be mounted horizontally so that its signal matches that of the searching radar signal

explanation: A SART's radar cross-section and signal reception are significantly improved by height. Mounting or holding the SART as high as possible increases its line-of-sight range, making it easier for search vessels or aircraft to detect the signal.
